SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-08-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-08-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. PLAINTIFF DAVID LJUNG MADISON STELLAR IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ARIELLE STELLAR IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT COMPASS CALIFORNIA II, INC IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS EMMA FINLEY. DEFENDANT PAULA ROSE IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STELLAR, DAVID LJUNG MADISON STELLAR, ARIELLE KATHLEEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMPASS CALIFORNIA II, INC AS A SUCC. TO COMPASS SF ROSE, PAULA YVONNE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
